extract: Diancie (Japanese: ディアンシー Diancie) is a dual-type Rock/Fairy Mythical Pokémon introduced in Generation VI. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, it is a mutation of Carbink. Diancie can Mega Evolve into Mega Diancie using the Diancite. Mega Diancie was introduced in Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire. Diancie was leaked in the March 2014 issue of CoroCoro magazine on February 11, 2014, and it was officially revealed on February 14, 2014. Mega Diancie was leaked in the July 2014 issue of CoroCoro magazine on June 7, 2014, and it was officially revealed on June 12, 2014.
